top_signals.title: Announcement of the publication of the Governor's interview transcript
top_signals.summary: Statement from the Bank of England
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Emperor and empress dine at a castle with Belgium’s royal family
top_signals.summary: They enjoyed their meal at a garden of the Royal Castle of Ciergnon near the town of Ciergnon in the municipality of Houyet, southern Belgium, for about an hour and a half.

top_signals.title: Japan arrests man suspected of links to alleged scam syndicate Prince Group, media report
top_signals.summary: The Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department have arrested Hu Shi, a Cypriot national, on suspicion of falsifying documents.
